name: Lethal Pill
description: Android panic/kill switch app for users at risk. One-tap data wipe + remote trigger via Firebase FCM. Built for journalists and activists in hostile environments.

name: JPverse
description: This portfolio. Flask app factory with Jinja2 templates, deployed on a VPS via Docker + Nginx with GitHub Actions CI/CD on every push to main.

name: Poco X6 Root Lab
description: Research project exploring the security model of Xiaomi Poco X6. Bootloader unlock, Magisk integration, and custom module development for device instrumentation.
